rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEONARD B. CAMERON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication On Petition For An Order Declaring Deed Of Trust On 12 Hillview Court, San Francisco, Ca Invalid, Null And Void
rulings.Rulings: As to 195 Hampton Court: The motion for summary adjudication is denied. There remains a triable issue of material fact as to Mr. Cameron¿s capacity in light of the deposition testimony of Mr. Moezzi, whose lay observations and opinion are admissible on the subject of contractual capacity. As to 12 Hillview Road: The motion for summary adjudication is denied. There remains a triable issue of material fact as to Mr. Cameron¿s capacity in light of the deposition testimony of Mr. Moezzi, whose lay observations and opinion are admissible on the subject of contractual capacity. In addition, there remains a triable issue whether Probate Code section 18102 is applicable under the circumstances of this case. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 2/29/12.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Produce Documents Specified In The Deposition Notice; And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Joseph Rolando Jack's Motion to Compel Attendance at Deposition and to Produce Documents and for Sanctions is denied without prejudice. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 2/29/12.
